marketBaseline.deVigMethod: per-book proportional normalisation: fair_A = raw_A / (raw_A + raw_B), applied to EACH book before any combination

marketBaseline.note: A_MULTIBOOK_LIVE (fallback A); 3 independent books, de-vigged per book before combining
